svg.text: Every resource Terraform manages for the energy-hackathon stack · us-east-1 · account 561700437092 · project video-upload-portal · 112 resources.

Lifecycle: S3 raw-videos/ upload → EventBridge fan-out → 3 Lambdas → 3 Fargate workers + Bedrock async → RDS (embeddings, clip_descriptions, frame_detections) → portal ALB renders results.
